title: Drum And Blaze
description: Drum and Blaze is a rising force in the music scene, bringing an electrifying mix of rhythm, energy, and inclusivity wherever they play. Recently making waves at major events like Brighton Pride and Lewes Bonfire, their performances are nothing short of spectacular. With a powerful drumming line-up, they know how to captivate an audience and ignite a crowd. Their contagious energy and vibrant spirit create an unforgettable atmosphere, leaving everyone craving more. Focusing on diversity and uniting people from all walks of life, Drum and Blaze proves that music has the power to bring us all together in one unbreakable rhythm. Get ready for a show that’ll get your heart racing!
